category_sources: source_facts.description says litmusctl is a command-line interface for interacting with LitmusChaos.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is litmusctl; official litmuschaos/litmusctl repository and LitmusChaos docs use the litmusctl name.
docs_sources: Official LitmusChaos docs are the primary documentation site for LitmusChaos; the litmusctl repository provides CLI-specific usage details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/litmuschaos/litmusctl, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LitmusChaos CLI usage; official LitmusChaos docs describe an end-to-end cloud-native chaos engineering platform.
